claim: Taylor & Francis / Experimental Mathematics author-instructions page at https://www.tandfonline.com/action/authorSubmission?show=instructions&journalCode=uemt20 returned HTTP 403 to anonymous fetch on 2026-05-18; no dedicated withdrawal-form workflow was retrieved from the canonical T&F source on this attempt.

T&F editorial policy (and prevailing ScholarOne practice for journal code uemt) accepts manuscript withdrawal via formal written request to the editorial office: either a 'Withdraw' button on the manuscript detail page in ScholarOne, or a 'Send Message to Editorial Office' message inside the submission record, or a direct email to the journal editorial office. Authors are advised to wait for written confirmation before submitting elsewhere.
verification_method: Web search synthesis of public guidance pages on T&F editorial policy and on ScholarOne uemt withdrawal procedure; canonical T&F instructions page was unreachable (claim C1), so this claim is flagged as a synthesis rather than a direct verification. Operator should confirm against the 17 May 2026 Kaviya correspondence which may contain a specific withdrawal-procedure reference.

verification_method: Direct read of three independent local files; all three concur on title, ID, date, author pen name, and ORCID.
